title: Rustic Portuguese Daikon Sandwich
description: A peppery, springy brunch sandwich featuring julienned daikon, a zesty vinaigrette, smoked sardines, and warm double‑rise bread—dairy‑free and full of Portuguese flavor.
instructions: Prepare the daikon relish by mixing julienned daikon, minced garlic, white wine vinegar, olive oil, sea salt, black pepper, chopped parsley, and lemon zest in a bowl.
Let the relish sit for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Warm a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and sear the smoked sardine fillets for 2 minutes per side or until the exterior is golden and the internal temperature reaches 145°F.
Slice the double‑rise bread horizontally to create a top and bottom loaf slice.
Spread the daikon relish evenly on the bottom slice of bread.
Place the seared sardine fillets on top of the relish, arranging them side by side.
Drizzle a light layer of olive oil over the sardines for extra moisture.
Cover the sardines with the top slice of bread and press gently to secure the sandwich.
Cut the sandwich diagonally and serve immediately with a sprinkle of fresh parsley.
